title: Hymaz Balls for Toddlers 1-3, Kids 9" Inflatable Bouncy Balls 5 Pack Colorful Soft Massage Ball Sensory Toys Knobby Ball Indoor Outdoor Games
features: Super Value Pack of 5 Knobby Sensory Balls: Each bulk set of massage balls includes 5 brightly colored sensory balls (red, blue, green, yellow, pink), featuring a textured knobby ball design that stimulates toddlers tactile development while doubling as a spiky massage ball tool to relieve stress. It’s not just a fun toy for little ones but also a perfect parent-child interaction companion, making sensory exploration engaging.

High Quality! Thick Rubber But Very Soft: Made of high-quality thick rubber, these inflatable sensory balls hold air well and stand up to rough play from toddlers. It is free of BPA and harmful substances, boasting a safe non-toxic profile. Ideal for babies, toddlers, and kids ages 1+.

Indoor & Outdoor Fun Games: With excellent bouncy balls performance, these knobby balls are great for throwing, rolling, bouncing, and catching in various settings—whether it’s indoor spaces like living rooms, airplane or gymnasiums, or outdoor areas such as garden, backyards and parks. They keep kids active and entertained all day long.

Easy Inflation & Portable Design: Balls comes with a dedicated hand pump and needle, the inflatable feature makes storage a breeze, perfect for travel or party favors. When inflated, the 8.5 inches / 22cm diameter fits perfectly in toddlers small hands to grip, and the lightweight design allows for easy throwing, effortlessly unlocking fun indoors and outdoors.

A Great Gifts: The sturdy construction ensures long-term use, while the easy-to-grip size and vibrant colors can easy catch kids eyes and use it play with their friends or a pet, providing endless hours of active fun for both indoor and outdoor games. Kids love them. Great gift for parents, teachers, therapists and more. Doubling as wonderful birthday party favors to boost the festive mood.
description: From the brand Previous page HUMAZ TOYS Hymaz is a toy brand that prioritizes quality, safety, and environmental awareness. Our toys are carefully crafted from non-toxic and safe materials. We cherish the growth of each child and invest in research and technology to create the latest and most exciting toys. Hymaz products are the perfect gift for kids and the whole family, a happy choice that will create lasting memories!
